Localization.Description: A user failed to log in

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to escalate prvileges to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to escalate prvileges on host {event_src.host}
A user failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
A user failed to escalate prvileges on host {event_src.host}
A user failed to escalate prvileges to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
